B.x: A comprehensive showcase of every block type available in the Vela presentation engine — from typography to media to data visualization.

S.n: Headings and Text Anchor Every Slide with Purpose

B.x: Headings deliver bold assertion copy. Sizes run from sm through 5xl with optional weight, color, and alignment — the structural backbone of every slide.
Body copy for narrative context. Supports size, color, and weight — ideal for explanatory paragraphs, captions, and supporting detail beneath a heading.
Compact label chips with optional icon. Use for slide tags, status indicators, category labels, or version markers at a glance.

S.n: Quotes Surface Insight; Callouts Demand Attention

B.x: The best interfaces disappear. They become the invisible hand guiding users to their goals — no friction, no confusion, no noise.
B.author: Design Principle #1

B.x: Callouts interrupt the flow intentionally. Use them for warnings, key takeaways, or anything the reader must not miss on first pass.
B.title: Pro Tip

B.x: This action cannot be undone. All associated records will be permanently removed from the system within 30 seconds.
B.title: Destructive Action

B.x: The divider above separates the two concepts — a lightweight horizontal rule styled to the deck theme.

S.n: Lists, Tags, and Icon Rows Organize at a Glance

I: bullets renders clean lists — each item is a string or rich object with icon and color overrides
Ideal for feature lists, requirements, pros/cons, and short summaries
Nesting and custom bullet icons are supported out of the box

S.n: Metrics and Progress Communicate Status Without Words
Tables Structure the Data Readers Need to Compare

B.x: Structured data with styled headers and alternating row support. Ideal for comparisons, specifications, and reference sheets.

S.n: Timelines and Flows Show How Work Actually Moves

I.x: Vela engine architecture finalized — core block types stabilized after 6 months of design iteration

I.title: Q2 2024
I.x: Public beta launched with 12 block types; 4,000 early-access decks created in first 30 days

I.title: Q3 2024
I.x: Full 21-block catalog released alongside DSL compiler v2 and CLI toolchain

I.title: Q1 2025
I.x: 1 million decks milestone reached; enterprise tier and team collaboration launched

S.n: Steps Turn Complex Processes into Clear Instructions

B.x: The steps block renders numbered instructions with title and description pairs. The image block embeds media with optional caption overlay.

I.title: Install the CLI
I.x: Run npm install -g @vela/cli to get the latest stable release globally

I.title: Author your deck
I.x: Write compact DSL JSON — sections, slides, and typed block arrays

I.title: Ship to JSX
I.x: Run vela deck ship deck.json --output presentation.jsx to compile

I.title: Deploy anywhere
I.x: Drop the self-contained JSX into any React app or export as static HTML

B.caption: Vela DSL authored in VS Code with live schema validation and block preview

S.n: Code, SVG, and Spacer Round Out the Full Toolkit

B.x: Syntax-highlighted code blocks, inline SVG graphics, and explicit spacer controls complete the 21-type catalog.

S.n: 21 Block Types. One Cohesive Presentation Engine.

B.x: From a single heading to complex data grids — Vela's complete block catalog covers every presentation need.
